scripts.predeploy: rm -rf ./lib && mkdir -p ./lib && python3 -m pip install --upgrade --no-cache-dir --target ./lib --platform manylinux2014_x86_64 --python-version 39 --implementation cp --abi cp39 --only-binary=:all: fastapi==0.115.6 uvicorn==0.34.0 pydantic==2.10.4 pydantic-core==2.27.2 exceptiongroup==1.2.2 sqlalchemy==2.0.36 numpy==1.26.4 scipy==1.13.1 scikit-learn==1.5.2 pandas==2.2.3 joblib==1.4.2 reportlab==4.2.5 networkx==3.2.1 && python3 -m pip install --upgrade --no-cache-dir --target ./lib python-louvain==0.16 --no-deps
